name: fastapi-auth
description: Complete auth system for FastAPI: JWT + bcrypt login/register, forgot/reset-password email flow (antisnoop 202, 60min token, RFC headers), rate limiting, Alembic migrations alongside legacy DDL, and the gotchas that cause prod incidents.

interface.shortDescription: Complete auth system for FastAPI: JWT + bcrypt login/register, forgot/reset-password email flow…
interface.longDescription: Complete auth system for FastAPI: JWT + bcrypt login/register, forgot/reset-password email flow (antisnoop 202, 60min token, RFC headers), rate limiting, Alembic migrations alongside legacy DDL, and the gotchas that cause prod incidents.
